name: eladve-claude-setup
description: Elad's Claude Code setup — cmux-first browsing/research, plus personal extras.

plugins.name: eladve-cmux-browser
plugins.description: Makes the cmux browser Claude's default tool for interactive web work and multi-item research, with surface hygiene, fetch/WebSearch discipline, and parallel-research patterns.

plugins.name: eladve-theme
plugins.description: Cmux Dark — a dark Claude Code theme with warm-orange user turns so your messages pop. Adds 'Cmux Dark' to /theme.
